emails.subject: RE: PLEASE RESPOND: HR Meeting
emails.body: RE: PLEASE RESPOND: HR Meeting Early next week in the afternoon would work best for me. Thanks, Holden To: Van houten, Maria; Meyers, Bert; Alport, Kysa; Bryson, Jesse; Salisbury, Holden

emails.subject: RE: PLEASE RESPOND: HR Meeting
emails.body: Holden-- I forgot that Amy will be out of the office next week until Friday. Can I schedule you for sometime in the afternoon this week, or on Friday of next week? Let me know. Sorry for the miscommunication. Thanks, Grace To: Rodriguez, Grace

emails.subject: RE: PLEASE RESPOND: HR Meeting
emails.body: Early afternoon tomorrow should work for me. Thanks To: Salisbury, Holden
